text:
3 components of Threads growth you can (and should) automate:

1. Posting — official Meta API handles this. No browser hacks, no ban risk.
2. Analytics — read what worked every night, no manual tracking.
3. Improvement — let AI rewrite tomorrow’s content based on real data.

One 2-hour setup with free tools. Tokens refresh themselves. You just watch the loop compound.

Grab the blueprint (link in bio)
